description:
'''Zoomergaze''' is a loosely defined style of [[electronic music]] and [[Nu gaze (2020s)|nu-gaze]] characterized by a 2020s [[shoegaze]] revival among [[Generation Z]] musicians. The style has been described as shoegaze made by Generation Z, as well as a blend of the genre with styles such as [[digicore]] and [[hyperpop]], alongside influences from [[alternative metal]] and [[grunge]]-inspired genres such as [[grungegaze]] and [[soft grunge (music)|soft grunge]].

During the late 2010s and early 2020s, hyperpop artists such as Strawberry Hospital, [[Fax Gang]] and [[Parannoul]] began to embrace shoegaze. In 2021 and 2022, the fusion was adopted by [[Jane Remover]] and [[Quannnic]]. Their albums ''[[Frailty (Jane Remover album)|Frailty]]'' and ''Kenopsia'' popularized the style, initiating a wave that included [[Aldn]], [[d0llywood1]] and [[Jaydes]]. By 2023, its popularity spread on [[TikTok]], where [[Wisp (musician)|Wisp]] became the genre's forefront act.
